grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Correctly cites Part 1, Section 5.14.1 for leasehold and Section 5.5.1 for building regulations

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Explicitly references Part 2 requirements and provides specific examples of different lenders' minimum lease terms

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: Clearly explains the 4-year rule for building works enforcement and mentions the 10-year rule for other breaches

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Discusses indemnity insurance as standard resolution and mentions specific policy requirements including lender acceptance criteria

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Response is specifically structured around Handbook sections with detailed citations and lender-specific examples rather than generic conveyancing advice
